general.title: General Settings
general.companyNameHelp: Appears in the header and footer of proposals sent to your clients.
general.publicAppUrlHelp: Domain used for proposal links shared with clients. Admin-only setting.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.stripeDescription: Enable to allow customers to subscribe to plans.
integrations.whatsappDescription: Add a default phone number for sharing proposals.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: These appear on your public proposal pages and PDFs sent to your clients.
branding.primaryHelp: Used for the proposal header bar, accept button and total.
branding.secondaryHelp: Used for text accents and PDF footer.
branding.accentHelp: Used to highlight the total amount and status badges.
branding.previewFreeNote: On the free plan, proposals are sent with Orca's branding. Your settings are saved for when you upgrade.
branding.freeLocked: Custom branding is a paid feature — free-plan proposals use Orca's branding.
